title: Test Magic Steal: 116-E01 STEAL_MAGIC_CARD

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Play this card when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the effect and steal the card. If possible, you must instantly play that card on your side of the field. If you cannot, send it to the original owner's cemetery.

plan.title: Test Magic Steal: 116-E01 STEAL_MAGIC_CARD
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Magic Steal and verify that 116-E01 STEAL_MAGIC_CARD resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules.

notes: Local fallback created this plan because no LLM provider was configured or the provider call failed.
Use the generated scenario match, then verify the expected assertions manually.

steps: Create the effect scenario match from this plan.
Confirm Player 1 controls or can play the source card.
Activate or play the source card through the available effect controls.
Resolve any target, card-selection, chain, battle, or effect-roll prompts.
Review the event log and the affected card/player state.

expectedAssertions.label: Source card exists in the generated match catalog.
Event log records the tested card or effect during execution.

manualVerification: Verify target behavior: Opponent magic card.
Verify value/effect result: Negate + take control.
riskNotes: Fallback plan cannot infer every WARD edge case.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.
